description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named github-Linux that runs on push and pull request events. Define a job matrix CI that tests on multiple Linux distributions (fedora:latest, fedora:rawhide, ubuntu:latest), with different C++ compilers (g++, clang++, icpc), CMake build types (Release, Debug), and OpenMP settings. For each matrix combination, run a job that checks out the code, uses a container from ghcr.io/kokkos/ci-containers, and performs a series of steps including caching, getting a trial license (if icpc), configuring with CMake, building, testing, and installing the project.
